hero.title: Pemphani polojekiti yopezeka mosavuta
hero.lead: IATF imayang'anitsitsa zopempha za polojekiti zopezeka zomwe zimachokera ku chosowa chenicheni.
support: Simufunikanso kudziŵa zonse zokhudza vutoli, koma muyenera kungodziŵa kuti likukhudza ndani, ndiponso chifukwa chake ndi lofunika.

items.label: Webusaiti
items.body: Gwiritsani ntchito fomu ili m'munsiyi kuti mupereke pempho lokonzedwa bwino.

items.label: Imelo
items.body: Tumizani pempho mwachindunji ku {{contact.requestsEmail}}. Mapempho amaimelo akhoza kukhala zolemba zofunsira pagulu atawunikiridwa ndi kusinthidwa.

items.label: Kusagwirizana
items.body: Yambani pamenepo ngati zimenezo ziri zophweka. Pempho likuyendabe m'kulingalira kofananako.

guidance.title: Musanatumize pempho
paragraphs: IATF imagwira ntchito pagulu. Zopempha zitha kufotokozedwa mwachidule ndikufalitsidwa ngati zolemba zofunsira pagulu mu bungwe la IATT GitHub, patsamba lino, kapena zonse ziwiri.

Musaphatikizepo maadiresi a anthu ena, manambala a foni, madokotala, kapena zinthu zina zokhudza munthu aliyense amene akugwiritsa ntchito zipangizo zothandizira, pokhapokha ngati n'zofunika ndiponso ngati simukuopa kuti bungwe la IATF lingafufuze nkhaniyo.
IATF imachotsa zinthu zosafunikira zokhudza munthuyo asanafalitse zolemba za pempho.

review.title: Ziyembekezo za Kupenda
paragraphs: IATF imayang'ana zopempha za ntchito yoyenera, kuthekera, phindu, komanso ngati ntchitoyo ili m'malo osungira anthu.
Pempho lina lingakanidwe, kuimitsidwa, kapena kusinthidwa lisanavomerezedwe.

fields.name: KuyankhulanaZambiri
fields.label: Zambiri zokhudza munthu amene mungakumane naye
fields.helper: Adilesi ya Imelo kapena dzina la Discord kuti mulandire.
fields.placeholder: Adilesi ya Imelo kapena dzina la Discord

fields.name: chinenero
fields.label: Chilankhulo
fields.helper: Chilankhulo chimene mumakonda, ngati chili chofunika.

fields.name: nkhani yotsatira
fields.label: Mkhalidwe wowonjezera
fields.helper: Gawani china chirichonse chimene chimathandiza kufotokoza kufunika: chifukwa chake kuli kofunika, zitsanzo, maumboni, lingaliro la mapulogalamu, kapena zoletsa za nthaŵi.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Kodi mumakhala omasuka ndi chitukuko cha magwero otseguka a anthu onse?
fields.helper: Mapulojekiti ovomerezeka ndi malo osungira anthu pansi pa IATF.

items: malo osungira anthu onse m'bungwe la IATF GitHub
layisensi ya copyleft ya code ndi zipangizo za polojekiti
Kulembetsa m'kaundula pa tsamba la IATF

header.title: Pempho lalifupi ndi lomveka bwino n'lokwanira kuti muyambe

paragraphs: Ngati muli ndi chosowa chenicheni cha kupezeka ndipo mukuganiza kuti chiyenera kukhala polojekiti yapagulu, titumizireni.
